summary: Comprehensive testing of Product Comparison Tool feature. All 17 backend API tests pass. All frontend tests pass. Compare checkboxes appear on product cards, floating compare bar shows when 2+ products selected, Compare Now navigates to /compare page with side-by-side comparison table. Save & Share creates shareable link. Shared comparisons are publicly accessible at /compare/:shareId without authentication. SSR regression test passes.
seed_data_creation: Created test comparisons via API during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product Comparison feature fully functional. Compare checkboxes on product cards (visible on hover, persist when selected with blue border). Floating compare bar appears at bottom when 2+ products selected. Compare Now button navigates to /compare?ids=... page. Save & Share button creates shareable link with 8-char share_id. Shared comparisons accessible at /compare/:shareId (public, no auth). CSRF tokens required for authenticated POST/DELETE requests - use session cookies from login.

backend_api_tests.POST /api/compare/quick (2 products): PASS - Returns product comparison data without auth
backend_api_tests.POST /api/compare/quick (invalid IDs): PASS - Returns 404 for invalid product IDs
backend_api_tests.GET /api/compare/shared/{share_id}: PASS - Returns comparison data (public, no auth)
backend_api_tests.SSR /trending-products (Googlebot): PASS - Returns ssr-content with article tags

frontend_ui_tests.Trending Products page loads: PASS - Shows product grid with 39 products (authenticated)
frontend_ui_tests.Compare bar shows product badges: PASS - Shows truncated product names with X buttons
frontend_ui_tests.Compare bar Clear button: PASS - Clears selection and hides bar
frontend_ui_tests.Compare table sections: PASS - Performance Scores, Financial Metrics, Trend & Growth, Score Comparison
frontend_ui_tests.Compare table metrics: PASS - Launch Score, Demand Score, Competition, UK Search Volume, Retail Price, Supplier Cost, Margin, Trend Stage, Growth Rate, TikTok Views, Competition Level
frontend_ui_tests.Save creates share link: PASS - Toast shows 'Comparison saved! Share link is ready.'
frontend_ui_tests.Shared page header: PASS - Shows TrendScout logo and 'Try TrendScout Free' CTA

features_verified: POST /api/compare/quick returns product comparison data without auth
POST /api/compare creates saved comparison with share_id (requires auth)
GET /api/compare/shared/{share_id} returns public shared comparison (no auth required)
GET /api/compare/my returns user's saved comparisons (requires auth)
Trending products page shows compare checkboxes on hover
Selecting 2+ products shows floating compare bar at bottom
Compare bar has 'Compare Now' button that navigates to /compare?ids=...
/compare page shows side-by-side product comparison table
Comparison table shows scores, pricing, margins, trends, competition
Save & Share button creates shareable link
SSR: Crawler requests still work for /trending-products (regression)
